title: Green List and seasonal jobs, qualifications and skills :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Green List and seasonal jobs, qualifications and skills
Find out about getting registered for your occupation, which jobs are on our Green List or seasonal jobs lists, and whether your qualifications can be used in New Zealand.
- Green List roles — jobs we need people for in New Zealand Search the Green List for roles we need workers for in New Zealand. If your role is listed, and you have the qualifications, registration or experience required, you may be able to apply for a residence visa immediately or after 2 years of working here.

## Green List roles — jobs we need people for in New Zealand
Search the Green List for roles we need workers for in New Zealand. If your role is listed, and you have the qualifications, registration or experience required, you may be able to apply for a residence visa immediately or after 2 years of working here.
- Find your job's skill level Check the occupation code and skill level for your job on the Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO) or National Occupation List (NOL).

## Find your job's skill level
Check the occupation code and skill level for your job on the Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO) or National Occupation List (NOL).
- ANZSCO occupations recognised at a higher skill level Some occupations on the Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO) are recognised at a higher skill level for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa (SMC) and some temporary visas.

## ANZSCO occupations recognised at a higher skill level
Some occupations on the Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO) are recognised at a higher skill level for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa (SMC) and some temporary visas.
- National Occupation List occupations used for an AEWV These National Occupation List (NOL) occupations can be used for an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV)

## National Occupation List occupations used for an AEWV
These National Occupation List (NOL) occupations can be used for an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV)
- Check if you need an International Qualification Assessment You may need to get an International Qualification Assessment (IQA) to show that your qualifications can be used in New Zealand.

## Check if you need an International Qualification Assessment
You may need to get an International Qualification Assessment (IQA) to show that your qualifications can be used in New Zealand.
- Check if you need occupational registration for your job In New Zealand you have to be registered with a specific organisation to work in some jobs. You must get your registration before you can apply for a visa to work in one of these roles. Check if you need to be registered for your job.

## Check if you need occupational registration for your job
In New Zealand you have to be registered with a specific organisation to work in some jobs. You must get your registration before you can apply for a visa to work in one of these roles. Check if you need to be registered for your job.
- Global Workforce Seasonal Visa jobs List of eligible jobs for the Global Workforce Seasonal Visa (GWSV), including codes and job requirements.

## Global Workforce Seasonal Visa jobs
List of eligible jobs for the Global Workforce Seasonal Visa (GWSV), including codes and job requirements.
- Peak Seasonal Visa jobs List of eligible jobs for the Peak Seasonal Visa (PSV), including ANZSCO codes and job requirements.

## Peak Seasonal Visa jobs
List of eligible jobs for the Peak Seasonal Visa (PSV), including ANZSCO codes and job requirements.
